evidence_contract.question: For each P45 model family, what exact target is being compared, and is a same-target CUT4--Zhao-Cui comparison authorized, blocked, or diagnostic-only?
evidence_contract.baseline_or_comparator: The P45-M0 target governance registry is checked against the P45 master/subplan. P44 diagnostic artifacts are source context only, not equality evidence.
evidence_contract.primary_promotion_criterion: Rows for generalized SV, spatial SIR, and predator-prey declare target identity, state law, observation law, parameterization, transformation/Jacobian terms, reference route, CUT4 route, Zhao-Cui route, panel convention, claim class, blocker class, route statuses, and nonclaims.
veto_diagnostics: same-target comparison authorized without reference, CUT4, and Zhao-Cui routes all available
transformed generalized-SV residual represented as exact native likelihood
SIR or predator-prey closure represented as native model correctness
factorized panels represented as coupled multivariate TT

commands.purpose: Validate P45-M0 target registry JSON syntax.
Run focused P45-M0 target registry semantic tests.
Compile the P45 phase gate and focused M0 test file.
commands.command: CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=-1 MPLCONFIGDIR=/tmp python -m compileall -q scripts/p45_phase_gate.py tests/highdim/test_p45_target_registry.py

commands.purpose: Check whitespace safety for the changed P45 artifacts.

diagnostics.summary: M0 blocks unsupported equality claims and makes native, diagnostic, approximation, closure, and factorized-panel boundaries executable through tests.

long_run_controls.resource_caps: No long run; CPU-only document, registry, test, compile, and diff validation.
